# catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode (Resource)

This resource can manage a Fabric Multicast Replication Mode.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode" "example" {
  fabric_id        = "8e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
  replication_mode = "HEADEND_REPLICATION"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fabric_id` (String) Fabric Site ID
- `replication_mode` (String) Replication Mode deployed in the fabric site
  - Choices: `HEADEND_REPLICATION`, `NATIVE_MULTICAST`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode.example "<fabric_id>,<id>"
```
